Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting

Interface ScoutListener

public interface ScoutListener
Callback interface for PureJavaZenohScout discovery events.

All three methods are default no-ops; implementers override only what they need. Callbacks run on the scout's reader threads (one per network interface). Do not block them for long-running work; hand off to an executor if needed.

All callbacks are invoked under the scout's internal registry lock, so a listener sees a totally ordered view per ZID (onDiscover → onUpdate… → onExpire), never interleaved.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onDiscover(DiscoveredNode node)
    First HELLO ever seen for this ZID.
    default void
    onExpire(DiscoveredNode node)
    The staleness sweeper has fired for this node - no HELLO within the configured stale window.
    default void
    onUpdate(DiscoveredNode prev, DiscoveredNode now)
    Later HELLO for a ZID we already know.

  • Method Details

    • onDiscover

      default void onDiscover(DiscoveredNode node)
      First HELLO ever seen for this ZID.

    • onUpdate

      default void onUpdate(DiscoveredNode prev, DiscoveredNode now)
      Later HELLO for a ZID we already know. prev is the last snapshot; now carries the refreshed DiscoveredNode.lastSeen() and, if the sender changed locators mid-run, updated DiscoveredNode.locators().

    • onExpire

      default void onExpire(DiscoveredNode node)
      The staleness sweeper has fired for this node - no HELLO within the configured stale window. The registry has already dropped it. A subsequent HELLO would fire onDiscover(io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting.DiscoveredNode) again.
